title: Keto Ginger Bitter Toast
description: A keto twist on traditional toast with the added flavors of ginger and bitter
instructions: Toast the almond flour in a small pan over medium heat for 2 minutes.
In a separate pan, melt the ghee over medium heat.
Add the grated ginger and cook for 1 minute.
Add the diced bitter melon and cook until tender.
In a bowl, beat the egg and season with salt and black pepper.
Add the cooked bitter melon mixture to the bowl and stir to combine.
Pour the egg mixture over the toasted almond flour and mix well.
Transfer the mixture to a greased loaf pan and bake for 20-25 minutes.
Slice the toast into thick slices and serve.
